G0.label:
α : Type u_1
x : α
xs : List α
ih : All (fun x => x ∈ xs) xs
wk : ∀ (a : α), a ∈ xs → a ∈ x :: xs
ih' : All (fun a => a ∈ x :: xs) xs
⊢ All (fun x_1 => x_1 ∈ x :: xs) (x :: xs)

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
x : α
xs : List α
ih : All (fun x => x ∈ xs) xs
wk : ∀ (a : α), a ∈ xs → a ∈ x :: xs
ih' : All (fun a => a ∈ x :: xs) xs
⊢ All (fun x_1 => x_1 ∈ x :: xs) (x :: xs)

G2.label:
case a
α : Type u_1
x : α
xs : List α
ih : All (fun x => x ∈ xs) xs
ih' : All (fun a => a = x ∨ a ∈ xs) xs
⊢ x = x ∨ x ∈ xs

G3.label:
case a
α : Type u_1
x : α
xs : List α
ih : All (fun x => x ∈ xs) xs
ih' : All (fun a => a = x ∨ a ∈ xs) xs
⊢ All (fun x_1 => x_1 = x ∨ x_1 ∈ xs) xs
